title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> If successful, they receive “The Tric
content:
✔ If successful, they receive “The Trickster’s Farewell” title and avoid the final showdown.

✅ Why This Works:
• Adds a meta-layer to the course, rewarding students who engage deeply with materials.
• Allows for both structured final tests and a hidden “trickster escape route.”
• Encourages playfulness, analysis, and critical thinking.

📌 Final Lock-In Questions for Version 5.7

1. Should students who take the Ascetic Path be allowed to interact in class discussions, or should they remain completely “silent monks”?

✔ If silent, they must submit all responses in writing instead.
✔ If they can speak, they must never discuss XP, challenges, or game mechanics.

2. Should there be multiple hidden “Easter eggs” throughout the semester that lead to small secret rewards?

✔ Example: A reference hidden in the syllabus that grants a one-time bonus if a student finds it.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 214 (chunk 214/555)
